name: public_transportation_newsroom_s_kestrel_lib_eq
premise: Stakeholders disagree on what counts as verified fact versus prudent assumption. Stakeholders disagree on what counts as verified fact versus prudent assumption. The situation maps to internal runbooks and external messaging tied to: public transportation newsroom s kestrel lib eq. The moral tension is explicitly framed as liberty versus equality: leadership cannot fully satisfy both without accepting tradeoffs. Pager queues are saturated; middle management is forwarding screenshots from an internal channel that is already leaking. The breach-notification and customer-communication clock has started; executive staff expect a single coherent position before the next press cycle. Treat unverified telemetry as hypothesis; do not assert facts you cannot support from retained logs. Any exception must be time-boxed, named, and reversible where technically feasible.

agents.name: Marco Nowak
agents.identity: I am Marco Nowak, the accountable decision-maker on this Public Transportation bridge; I own what gets logged, communicated, and executed in the next window.
agents.goal: I need to stop the bleeding without baking in a rule that later punishes equality whenever someone invokes liberty.

agents.name: Harper Nielsen
agents.identity: I am Harper Nielsen, responsible for surfacing who gets protected last when systems fail; I am watching for silent harm and unfair distribution.
agents.goal: I want safeguards so equality is not sacrificed by default just because liberty feels morally loud in the moment.

choices: I will choose a narrow, time-boxed authorization with explicit human override, subgroup monitoring, and a hard stop if harm indicators rise—accepting slower relief to protect equality.

I will choose a broad immediate authorization to stabilize outcomes fast, with transparent metrics and rapid correction afterward—accepting higher risk to equality to secure liberty before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: External parties will infer a decision if none is posted. With partial evidence, Marco Nowak must decide under liberty versus equality. What does Marco Nowak do?
